bbc.title: At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire
bbc.description: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through blasting flames to escape.

bbc.title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran
bbc.description: Iranian forces earlier said the Strait was closed and launched wide-ranging attacks at US allies and bases in the region.

bbc.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
bbc.description: Donald Trump pays tribute to the 71-year-old South Carolina senator, calling him a "true American patriot" who will be "greatly missed".

bbc.title: Anthony Zurcher: From Trump critic to ally, Lindsey Graham was a political survivor of the Maga era
bbc.description: The senator's career was marked by a willingness to adapt to America's dramatically changing political climate, writes the BBC's North America correspondent.

bbc.title: Badly burned British couple rescued from ravine during Spain wildfires, reports say
bbc.description: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province, local media reports.

bbc.title: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall
bbc.description: Schools, work and outdoor activities have been suspended in Zhejiang province and many transport services cancelled.

bbc.title: David Willey, esteemed BBC Vatican correspondent, dies aged 93
bbc.description: One of the BBC's longest-serving foreign correspondents, he reported on five popes during his career.

bbc.title: T. rex could become most expensive fossil ever - but it's a ​problem for scientists
bbc.description: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.

bbc.title: How Aldi is taking on US supermarkets with its $4 almond butter
bbc.description: The German supermarket's $9bn US push targets urban hubs like Manhattan. Can its discount model match Walmart?

bbc.title: Will Trump Accounts deliver for American children?

bbc.title: Major car firms found not to have installed emissions-cheating devices
bbc.description: A High Court judge said some major car manufacturers did not install a device to cheat emissions testing.

bbc.title: EasyJet agrees to surprise takeover bid as rival US firm swoops in
bbc.description: The airline says a bid from US firm Apollo has trumped a recent takeover offer from Castlelake.

bbc.title: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
bbc.description: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.

bbc.title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
bbc.description: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

bbc.title: Vapes to have less enticing names and flavours to protect children
bbc.description: People are being consulted about plans to stop vape companies using enticing flavour descriptions that "attract" children into experimenting.
